arts.ttl: FA Cup predictions: Birmingham can dump out Newcastle
arts.sum: Our betting expert Jones Knows provides his insight as he analyses the weekend's FA Cup fourth-round action and makes a case for Birmingham to beat Newcastle.

arts.ttl: Wembley redemption awaits for Newcastle United and this one feels very different
arts.sum: As for Nick Pope, seen as United's No 1 from the day he signed, it would mean missing out on two successive finals having been suspended for a single match - the match - last time. League One leaders Birmingham, a club with a past but a limited present, are the opposition at the end of a long week of variety which has seen United play in the Premier League, Carabao Cup and now FA Cup. Do Newcastle need to keep going when the League Cup and Champions League qualification dominates the mind?

arts.ttl: Arsenal Isak LATEST, Man Utd eye WONDERKID, Chelsea line up SWAP transfer: FT Recap
arts.sum: Arsenal Isak LATEST, Man Utd eye WONDERKID, Chelsea line up SWAP transfer: FT Recap The January transfer window may have just closed but the news continues to develop as teams prepare for the remainder of the season and make plans for the summer.

arts.ttl: Liverpool 4-0 Tottenham (4-1 aggregate): Arne Slot's side reach Carabao Cup final after four-goal demolition - with Reds set to face Newcastle at Wembley
arts.sum: IAN LADYMAN AT ANFIELD: Postecoglou said before kick-off that his team would play on the front foot but that didn't turn out to be the case at all. Quite the opposite was true.

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe has worked wonders at Newcastle - but don't compare him to Mikel Arteta
arts.sum: Newcastle defeated Arsenal 4-0 in the Carabao Cup final, with Eddie Howe seeing his team win the second leg 2-0 on Wednesday night to beat Mikel Arteta and reach the final at Wembley

arts.ttl: Preview: Birmingham City vs. Newcastle United - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's FA Cup clash between Birmingham City and Newcastle United, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Sven Botman Arsenal injury revealed as Emil Krafth stands by for FA Cup tie
arts.sum: Botman scored 10/10 in the Chronicle Live match ratings and put in his best performance yet since returning from a long-term knee problem. After the magnificent Carabao Cup glory night against Arsenal, which booked a place at Wembley, Howe said: "I don't quite know what the problem was with Sven, why he had to be withdrawn.

arts.ttl: Newcastle 2-0 Arsenal (4-0 agg): Match report & 3 talking points as Gunners miss out on Wembley
arts.sum: Anthony Gordon doubled Newcastle's lead on the night and gave them a four-goal advantage on aggregate after punishing a slack pass from David Raya, with the Magpies holding firm to secure their trip to Wembley in March, for the second time in thre seasons. Newcastle could have put the tie beyond Arsenal's reach just three minutes into the second half as William Saliba's error allowed Gordon a shooting opportunity from 50 yards with Raya out of position.

arts.ttl: Alexander Isak's 'selfless' act sums up Newcastle United dressing room spirit
arts.sum: Newcastle United striker Alexander Isak has revealed that winning the Carabao Cup is more important to him than winning this season's golden boot or winning PFA player of the year. But I would say that winning the League Cup is an individual win as well because every player wants to win trophies.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta proved a disaster that happened at Arsenal last summer in both defeats to Newcastle - opinion
arts.sum: Arsenal are now heading for a warm summer training camp in Dubai knowing that their only chances of winning silverware this season are confined to...
